backtrace.h(3) Library Functions Manual backtrace.h(3)

NAME

backtrace.h - Cross-platform backtrace and stack trace capture.

SYNOPSIS

Functions


int platform_backtrace (void **buffer, int size)
Get a backtrace of the current call stack. char ** platform_backtrace_symbols (void *const *buffer, int size)
Convert backtrace addresses to symbol names. void platform_backtrace_symbols_destroy (char **strings)
Free symbol array from platform_backtrace_symbols(). void backtrace_print_simple (int skip_frames)
Print backtrace of the current call stack.

Detailed Description

Cross-platform backtrace and stack trace capture.

Definition in file platform/backtrace.h.
